case_title: MOONEY, WILLIAM et al VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNI) (MTMOPS)

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO WILLIAM MOONEY. AND MIKELLE MOONEY.
REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT BY DEFENDANT, CCSF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY-MAXINE ANDERSON. EXEMPT.
DEFENDANTS REQUEST TO POSTPONE HEARING TO 04/24/06 AT 1:30 PM GRANTED BY ORDER OF THE COURT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNI) (MTMOPS)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,542.05 FILED BY MOONEY, WILLIAM MOONEY, MIKELLE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNI) (MTMOPS) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
